home.features.quality.title: Quality & proven field efficiency

home.research.title: Science applied
home.research.subtitle: Our research approach combines agronomic observation, technical design, real-condition validation, and field transfer to build reliable, coherent, and sustainably effective solutions.
home.research.steps.one.title: Observe with precision
home.research.steps.one.text: Analyzing crop context, vegetative behavior, and agronomic constraints is the starting point for useful, rigorous research genuinely connected to the field.
home.research.steps.two.title: Design a coherent response
home.research.steps.two.text: Research helps guide technical choices, structure formulation approaches, and build solutions adapted to nutrition, stimulation, and balance objectives.
home.research.steps.three.title: Validate in real conditions
home.research.steps.three.text: Trial protocols and field observations make it possible to assess consistency, technical relevance, and solution coherence in real production situations.
home.research.steps.four.title: Turn research into field action
home.research.steps.four.text: Scientific results reach their full value when they become clear recommendations, concrete solutions, and support capable of sustaining agricultural performance over time.

home.reviews.items.three.author: Farm manager

home.reviews.items.four.author: Field partner
home.reviews.items.five.text: We saw strong coherence between the technical promise, the application logic, and the results observed over time.
home.reviews.items.five.author: Citrus grower
home.reviews.items.six.text: The quality of the service comes as much from the solution as from the support: field presence, listening, and ability to adjust.

about.hero.title: An agricultural company designed
about.hero.titleAccent: for performance, rigor, and the field
about.hero.text: We develop an agricultural vision based on agronomic expertise, technical support, and the coherence of solutions applied in the field.
about.manifesto.title: Building an agriculture
about.manifesto.titleAccent: that is clearer, more technical, and more sustainable
about.manifesto.text1: SOGEDAG follows a path of agronomic standards, field proximity, and continuous improvement. Our goal is not only to offer solutions, but to contribute to coherent, sustainable technical decisions that are truly adapted to crops.
about.manifesto.text2: We believe in high-performing agriculture built on field understanding, precise needs, and quality support.

about.vision.text1: Our vision is based on an agriculture where technique remains clear, the field remains central, and solutions fit into an overall logic of sustainable performance.
about.vision.text2: Every recommendation should be understandable, every solution should be coherent, and every intervention should help strengthen the quality of decisions made on the farm.

about.metrics.subtitle: A dynamic built on consistency, proximity, and technical standards.

about.commitment.text: Beyond products and formulations, our commitment is to provide clear technical insight, useful field presence, and a support logic consistent with agricultural realities.

blogDetail.label: Blog
blogDetail.sidebar.author: Author
blogDetail.posts.comprendreTerrain.title: Understanding the field before any technical decision
blogDetail.posts.comprendreTerrain.conte:
Agronomic observation remains the starting point of a coherent crop strategy. Before any intervention, it is essential to read the context, the crop’s needs, and field constraints.

Observe before acting

Any relevant agronomic decision begins with precise observation. The state of the crop, the soil structure, the plot history, and the climatic conditions are all elements that help identify the real need.

Identify real needs

A crop does not always express its needs in an obvious way. You need to cross-check visible signals, the physiological stage, and the production objective.

A strong technical decision always begins with an accurate reading of the field.

Build a coherent response

Observation only has value if it leads to a structured decision. This is where agronomic expertise becomes essential: turning findings into a clear strategy.

privacy.hero.label: Data protection
privacy.hero.title: Privacy policy
privacy.hero.intro: This page explains how personal data may be collected, used, protected, and stored as part of the use of the site.
privacy.sections.one.title: 1. Purpose
privacy.sections.one.text: The purpose of this privacy policy is to inform users of the site about how their personal data is collected, processed, and protected.
privacy.sections.two.title: 2. Data controller
privacy.sections.two.text1: The personal data collected on the site is processed by
privacy.sections.three.title: 3. Data collected
privacy.sections.three.text1: Depending on how the site is used, the following data may be collected:
privacy.sections.three.text2: identity data (first and last name), contact details (email, phone), information sent through contact or quote request forms, browsing data, and any other information voluntarily provided by the user.
privacy.sections.four.title: 4. Purposes of processing
privacy.sections.four.text1: Collected data may be used to:
privacy.sections.four.text2: respond to requests sent through the site, process contact requests, prepare quotes, improve user experience, analyze site traffic, ensure the proper technical functioning of the site, and comply with applicable legal obligations.
privacy.sections.five.title: 5. Legal basis
privacy.sections.five.text: Data processing is based, depending on the case, on the user’s consent, the performance of pre-contractual measures, the legitimate interest of the publisher, or compliance with legal obligations.
privacy.sections.six.title: 6. Data recipients
privacy.sections.six.text1: Collected data is intended for SOGEDAG’s internal departments and, where necessary, certain technical service providers involved in the operation of the site, strictly within the limits of their duties.
privacy.sections.six.text2: Data is not sold to third parties and is only communicated when operational, contractual, or legal necessity requires it.
privacy.sections.seven.title: 7. Retention period
privacy.sections.seven.text: Personal data is kept for no longer than necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, subject to applicable legal obligations.
privacy.sections.eight.title: 8. Security
privacy.sections.eight.text: SOGEDAG implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against loss, alteration, unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.
privacy.sections.nine.title: 9. User rights
privacy.sections.nine.text1: In accordance with applicable regulations, each user may have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict, object to, and where applicable, port their personal data.
privacy.sections.nine.text2: The user may also withdraw consent when processing is based on it.
privacy.sections.ten.title: 10. Exercising rights
privacy.sections.ten.text1: To exercise their rights or ask a question regarding data protection, the user may contact SOGEDAG through the
privacy.sections.ten.text2: page or via the dedicated address indicated by the publisher.
privacy.sections.eleven.title: 11. Cookies
privacy.sections.eleven.text1: The site may use cookies or similar technologies to improve its functioning, measure its audience, and provide smoother navigation.
privacy.sections.eleven.text2: Users may configure their browser to manage, limit, or refuse cookies.
privacy.sections.twelve.title: 12. Policy updates
privacy.sections.twelve.text: This privacy policy may be modified at any time to reflect legal, technical, or organizational developments. The version published on this page is the one applicable at the time of consultation.

legal.hero.label: Legal information
legal.hero.title: Legal notice
legal.hero.intro: This page presents the legal information relating to the publication, hosting, and use of the site.
legal.sections.one.title: 1. Website publisher
legal.sections.two.title: 2. Hosting
legal.sections.three.title: 3. Intellectual property
legal.sections.three.text1: All content present on this site, including texts, images, graphics, logos, icons, videos, documents, downloadable elements, and any other content, is protected by the applicable intellectual property provisions.
legal.sections.three.text2: Unless otherwise stated, these elements are the exclusive property of SOGEDAG. Any reproduction, representation, distribution, adaptation, modification, or exploitation, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization, is prohibited.
legal.sections.four.title: 4. Liability
legal.sections.four.text1: SOGEDAG strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of the information published on the site. However, the publisher cannot guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or absence of errors in all content.
legal.sections.four.text2: The user acknowledges using the information available on the site under their sole responsibility. SOGEDAG cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damage resulting from access to the site or its use.
legal.sections.five.title: 5. Hyperlinks
legal.sections.five.text: The site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for information purposes only. SOGEDAG exercises no control over the content of these sites and disclaims any responsibility for their content, operation, or privacy policy.
legal.sections.six.title: 6. Personal data
legal.sections.six.text1: Any personal data collected through the site is processed in accordance with the applicable privacy policy.
legal.sections.six.text2: The user may exercise their rights of access, rectification, objection, or deletion in accordance with applicable regulations by contacting the publisher at the address provided for this purpose.
legal.sections.seven.title: 7. Cookies
legal.sections.seven.text1: The site may use cookies or similar technologies to improve user experience, measure traffic, or ensure certain functionalities.
legal.sections.seven.text2: The user may configure their browser to refuse all or part of the cookies, subject to the limitations this may cause on certain site functionalities.
legal.sections.eight.title: 8. Applicable law
legal.sections.eight.text1: These legal notices are governed by the law applicable in the country where the publisher is established, subject to any mandatory applicable rule.
legal.sections.eight.text2: In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, the competent courts shall be those within the jurisdiction of the publisher’s registered office, unless otherwise required by law.
legal.sections.nine.title: 9. Contact
legal.sections.nine.text1: For any question relating to the site or its content, you may contact SOGEDAG via the

productDetail.products.stimRoot.descript: Stim Root is a biostimulant designed to support root development and encourage more regular vegetative recovery.
productDetail.products.stimRoot.usage: Used during recovery or development phases, it fits into a logic of physiological support for the crop.
productDetail.products.stimRoot.benefits: Fits into a coherent agronomic strategy
productDetail.products.greenPulse.descri: Green Pulse is a foliar solution designed to support plant vigor and strengthen physiological activity.
productDetail.products.greenPulse.usage: It can be used in technical programs aimed at maintaining vegetative dynamics and development consistency.
productDetail.products.activeFlow.descri: Active Flow is formulated to help the plant better cope with certain periods of stress.
productDetail.products.activeFlow.usage: It is used within a crop-securing strategy when the environment or cycle creates greater demands.
productDetail.products.activeFlow.benefi: Fits sensitive stages of the cycle
productDetail.products.calborTech.descri: CalBor Tech is a technical solution dedicated to the specific needs of sensitive crop stages.
productDetail.products.calborTech.usage: It fits into programs where precision of application and nutritional coherence are essential.
productDetail.products.magActive.descrip: Mag Active supports the crop’s nutritional balance in targeted-need contexts.
productDetail.products.magActive.usage: It can be positioned in a program to support nutritional consistency and development quality.
productDetail.products.traceMixPro.descr: Trace Mix Pro provides a targeted supply of trace elements for highly demanding agronomic situations.
productDetail.products.traceMixPro.usage: It is designed for contexts where precision of response and technical adjustment are decisive.
productDetail.products.mineralOne.descri: Mineral One is a technical nutrition solution designed to improve nutrient availability.
productDetail.products.mineralOne.usage: It is used in advanced nutrition strategies where precision and stability are sought.
productDetail.products.techAssimil.descr: Tech Assimil is dedicated to more precise and better regulated nutrient assimilation by the plant.
productDetail.products.techAssimil.usage: It fits in programs where assimilation efficiency is an important agronomic issue.

productDetail.products.organicBase.usage: It fits into a fertilization vision focused on agronomic continuity and soil balance.

productDetail.products.solubleMax.usage: It fits into modern fertilization systems requiring control and responsiveness.
productDetail.products.pastaGrow.descrip: Pasta Grow is a paste version designed for regular and technical nutrition.

productDetail.products.balanceNpk.descri: Balance NPK provides nutritional balance adapted to the different stages of the crop cycle.
productDetail.products.balanceNpk.usage: It can be positioned according to the needs of the stage, the crop, and the target objective.

productDetail.products.mineralCrop.usage: It supports growth and nutrition in different production contexts.
productDetail.products.yieldSupport.desc: Yield Support is designed to support vigor and production consistency.
productDetail.products.yieldSupport.usag: It fits into a technical support logic focused on continuity of performance.

researchDetail.posts.rootBioMaize.title: Effect of root biostimulation on maize establishment
researchDetail.posts.rootBioMaize.author: SOGEDAG Research Division
researchDetail.posts.rootBioMaize.conten:
This research was conducted to evaluate the impact of root biostimulation on maize establishment quality, the crop’s initial vigor, and development consistency during the early stage.

Study context

Crop establishment is a decisive stage for the rest of the cycle. Uniform recovery, functional rooting, and regular growth determine the technical stability of the cropping pathway.

Objective

The objective of this work was to observe to what extent a root biostimulation strategy could support vegetative recovery, improve rooting dynamics, and strengthen development uniformity.

Observations

Observations focused on recovery speed, initial vigor, root development quality, and growth continuity across the different tested approaches.

The results highlight the value of a more precise approach to physiological needs during the establishment phase.

Conclusion

Root biostimulation reaches its full value when it is part of a coherent agronomic reading. It does not replace the technical strategy, but it can help strengthen its consistency and relevance.
researchDetail.posts.foliarNutrition.tit: Foliar nutrition and vegetative balance during the growth phase
researchDetail.posts.foliarNutrition.con:
This publication presents an analysis of the physiological responses observed after applying foliar formulations in different growth contexts.

Framework

Foliar nutrition can be a useful adjustment lever when it is reasoned according to stage, the crop’s real needs, and the technical objectives pursued.

Selected approach

Observations compared several field situations in order to evaluate the effect on vigor, foliar expression quality, and growth consistency.

Technical reading

The results show that coherence between formulation, application timing, and agronomic context remains decisive in the quality of the response obtained.
